original_text: In the broader AI and competitive landscape, Microsoft's recent earnings reveal increased spending on artificial intelligence and a significant backlog, highlighting the intensifying race for AI dominance.
revised_text: In the broader AI and competitive landscape, Apple Inc. has demonstrated increasing investment in research and development, with R&D expenses rising from $26.3 billion in FY 2022 to $34.6 billion in FY 2025, reflecting ongoing innovation efforts within the competitive technology sector.
changes_summary: Removed unsupported claims about Microsoft's earnings and AI spending due to lack of evidence in available chunks, which only cover Apple Inc. Revised the paragraph to focus on Apple's increasing R&D expenses as supported by cited income statement chunks, maintaining a professional tone and ensuring all factual claims are evidence-based.
